no: Random Graion Magic by GraionDilach. SR companion mod — all components require Spell Revisions. Restores SR-removed spells and tweaks SR spell behavior. Uses ClassSpellTool for cn:100/115 (install after kit mods). Active mod (v0.12, Dec 2025). Not extracted — needs downloading.

spells: Restores Spell Immunity as separate purchasable spell (SR fix)
Restores unnerfed True Sight as level 6 True Vision (SR fix)
Cure Light Wounds always heals maximum dice
Cure Medium Wounds always heals maximum dice
Cure Serious Wounds always heals maximum dice
Cure Critical Wounds always heals maximum dice

new: Fixes missing Conjure Water Elemental when SR installed before IWD spells.

spells: Restores Slow Poison's poison-curing effect (SR changes it)

sum: Random magic/spell (tweaks) by Graion Dilach for the Infinity Engine.

co.n: Add back Spell Immunity against Spell Revisions [ClassSpellTool]
co.tp2n: Add back Spell Immunity against Spell Revisions [ClassSpellTool]
co.no: Restores Spell Immunity as a separate purchasable spell when using Spell Revisions. REQUIRES SR cn:0. HARD FAIL: 'MEWI5.TXT not found in KEY file' — same ClassSpellTool cascade issue as Shadow Magic cn:3. Transitions cn:0 triggers cascade that kills MEWI files. WORKAROUND: manually copy MEWI*.txt and MEPR*.txt from any ClassSpellTool mod's no_overwrite/ into override before this component runs.

co.n: Add back vanilla True Sight as a level higher spell against Spell Revisions [ClassSpellTool]
co.tp2n: Add back vanilla True Sight as a level higher spell against Spell Revisions [ClassSpellTool]
co.no: Restores unnerfed True Sight as level 6 'True Vision' alongside SR's nerfed version. REQUIRES SR cn:0. HARD FAIL: same MEWI5.TXT ClassSpellTool cascade issue as cn:100. Same workaround applies.

co.n: Maximize Cure Wounds' effect in Spell Revisions
co.tp2n: Maximize Cure Wounds' effect in Spell Revisions
co.no: Cure Wounds spells always heal maximum dice (e.g. Cure Light Wounds always heals 8+bonus instead of 1d8+bonus). REQUIRES SR cn:0. Significant power boost to healing — removes RNG from curing.

co.n: Install Spell Revisions standard Conjure Water Elemental when IWD spells from IWDification/SCS are installed
co.tp2n: Install Spell Revisions standard Conjure Water Elemental when IWD spells from IWDification/SCS are installed
co.no: Fixes missing Conjure Water Elemental (level 6) when SR is installed before IWD spells. OBSOLETE: This bug was fixed in SCS v35, Talents of Faerun, and IWDification v6. Not needed with current versions.

co.tp2n: Restore older functionality to Slow Poison so that it cures poison instead of slowing it down
co.no: Restores Slow Poison to cure poison instead of just slowing it (SR changes it to only slow). Requires EE Fixpack. REQUIRES SR cn:0.
